data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to the minimum remaining-validity days for requirement items. The linked use case indicates a scenario where a candidate is flagged ineligible due to insufficient credential validity, but there is no direct evidence or API reads that confirm the validation of this specific requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of validation for requirement items with minimum remaining-validity days.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for minimum remaining-validity days.
